title: I made a webcam motion detector, local/cloud storage, AI person detect
abstract: Polished up this code with AI assisted iterations. I created the original in the BeforeAI era, one line of JavaScript at a time. Integrated with OpenAI for AI powered person detection. Need some coin to pay for the cloud storage and AI processing. Otherwise, the local storage of motion detected and
abstract_zh: 我用一根手指一行行码出的原始代码，现在有了 AI 的加持，简直牛逼哄哄！这回不用再担心电费了，直接上云，AI 一检测到人影我就开心一阵。不过，还得找点钱养活这片乌云和那个 AI。毕竟本地存储免费，但谁让咱得享受一下科技的便利呢！
